What We Build

Every site is built from scratch

No page builders. No cookie-cutter templates. Every Luxcoda website is designed and coded specifically for your brand.

✦
01

Custom Design

Every pixel crafted for your brand. No templates, no shortcuts. Unique to you, always.

◈
02

Mobile Optimised

Flawless on every screen. Your customers browse on phones — we make sure every detail is perfect.

⬡
03

SEO Ready

Built to rank. Fast load times, clean code, and proper structure so Google finds you first.

⚡
04

Live in 7 Days

We move fast. From first call to fully live website in one week. No waiting months.

◎
05

Ongoing Support

Monthly plans cover hosting, SSL, updates and priority support. We're your tech team.

▲
06

Built to Convert

Designed with one goal — turning visitors into paying customers. Strategy baked in from day one.

How It Works

From idea to live in 7 days

A streamlined process built around your schedule. We handle everything end to end.

01

Discovery Call

We jump on a free call to understand your business, goals, and what makes you different. 30 minutes, zero fluff.

📞
02

Custom Design

Our designers build your site from scratch — tailored to your brand, industry, and customers. No templates ever.

✎
03

Review & Refine

You review the design, we refine it together. Two full rounds of revisions included. We don't stop until you love it.

🔍
04

Go Live

We handle hosting, domain, SSL, speed optimisation, and launch. Your site is live and customers can find you.

🚀
